mechanism_narrative: High retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer spending, which boosts corporate revenues and earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of observations when RSAFS is above its 12-month moving average, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.5%, monetary policy is restrictive, slowing economic activity and compressing equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If when FEDFUNDS > 4.5%, the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 50% of occurrences, reject.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of very low unemployment (UNRATE below 4%) and very high industrial production (INDPRO above 100) signals a late-cycle economy nearing capacity constraints, where tightening labor markets and rising input costs squeeze profits, depressing stock prices over 20 days.
failure_condition: If when UNRATE<4% and INDPRO>100, the 20-day forward return is positive in more than 50% of cases, reject.

mechanism_narrative: In an environment with high inflation (CPIAUCSL above 300) and high interest rates (FEDFUNDS above 5%), elevated discount rates and cost pressures erode corporate earnings and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 days.
regime_hint: high inflation and high interest rates
failure_condition: If when CPIAUCSL>300 and FEDFUNDS>5%, the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 40% of months, reject.

mechanism_narrative: High industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust manufacturing activity, which supports near-term earnings optimism, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If when INDPRO is above its 12-month average, the 5-day forward return is negative in more than 50% of cases, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A very low unemployment rate (UNRATE below 4%) indicates a tight labor market, which can lead to wage inflation and margin compression, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If when UNRATE<4%, the 20-day forward return is positive in more than 50% of observations, reject.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous occurrence of very high housing starts (HOUST above 1400) and very high GDP (GDPC1 above 20000) points to an overheated demand environment that is unsustainable, leading to a correction and negative S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: If when HOUST>1400 and GDPC1>20000, the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 40% of observations, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When GDP is above 20000 billion chained 2017 dollars, the economy is in a strong expansion, and corporate earnings growth supports ongoing equity gains, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If when GDPC1>20000, the 20-day forward return is negative in more than 50% of observations, reject.
